free_text: Cross section requirements for charged-particle fusion
reactions: the 6Li(p,3He)alpha reaction
The targets consisted of about 10 mu-g/cm2 of lithium
enriched in Li evaporated onto 10 mu-g/cm2 carbon
backing and were transferred to the scattering chamber
under vacuum to avoid excessive oxidation
By detecting both 3He and a particles at each angle,
a complete angular distribution is obtained in both
forward and back quadrants.
8 silicon surface-barrier detectors of about
500 microm thickness
Fluctuations in the thickness
Compilation produced by Arzamas RFNC-VNIIEF
